Class GameScreen

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.AnchorPane
gui.GameScreen
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class GameScreen extends javafx.scene.layout.AnchorPane
Gameplay screen that renders elements, potions, souls, timer, and drag actions.

    getStyleableNode

  • Constructor Details

    • GameScreen

      public GameScreen(Main main, int level)
      Builds the gameplay screen for a level and starts its timer.
      Parameters:
      main - main application used for screen changes
      level - selected gameplay level

  • Method Details

    • setButtonLayout

      public void setButtonLayout(javafx.scene.control.Button button, int x_pos, int y_pos, int width, int height)
      Scales a transparent button from base artwork coordinates.
      Parameters:
      button - button to position
      x_pos - x coordinate from the base design
      y_pos - y coordinate from the base design
      width - button width from the base design
      height - button height from the base design

    • levelLabelHandling

      public void levelLabelHandling(javafx.scene.control.Label levelLabel, int level)
      Sets the level label text and position.
      Parameters:
      levelLabel - label that displays level progress
      level - current level number

    • timeLabelLayoutHandling

      public void timeLabelLayoutHandling(javafx.scene.control.Label timeLabel)
      Sets the time label text, font, and position.
      Parameters:
      timeLabel - label that displays remaining time

    • progressLabelLayoutHandling

      public void progressLabelLayoutHandling(javafx.scene.control.Label progressLabel)
      Sets the progress label text, font, and position.
      Parameters:
      progressLabel - label that displays defeated soul progress

    • backButtonConfirmationHandler

      public void backButtonConfirmationHandler(javafx.scene.control.Button backButton)
      Shows a confirmation dialog before returning to the main menu.
      Parameters:
      backButton - button that triggered the handler

    • updateProgressLabel

      public void updateProgressLabel()
      Refreshes the defeated soul progress label.

    • handleElementButton

      public void handleElementButton(BaseElement element)
      Sends a selected element to the merge system and updates the screen.
      Parameters:
      element - element selected by the player

    • updateMergeBoardUI

      public void updateMergeBoardUI()
      Clears merge selection display after the merge state changes.

    • showPotionInMergeStation

      public void showPotionInMergeStation(BasePotion potion)
      Displays a created potion in the merge station.
      Parameters:
      potion - potion to display

    • updateSoulBeltUI

      public void updateSoulBeltUI()
      Refreshes all visible soul slots from the current soul belt.
